para.bold: Pointer to the function in the Matrix form on the real-time axis ( $f(t)$) ; 'data_+ $ (t+1)\;*$element_size' corresponds to (0,0)-component of $f(t)$.
Maximum number of the time steps.
Number of the colums in the Matrix form.
Number of the rows in the Matrix form.
Size of the data stored for the function on the real-time axis including $ t=-1$; $ (n_t + 2)$ * size1 * size2 .
Size of the Matrix form; size1*size2.

memberdef.argsstring: (int i1, int i2, function &g, int j1, int j2)
memberdef.name: set_matrixelement

memberdef.argsstring: (int tstp, int i1, int i2, EigenMatrix &M, int j1, int j2)
memberdef.name: set_matrixelement

para.bold: Class function for objects $ f(t) $ with time on real axis.

detaileddescription.para:
Purpose
This class contains the data of a function of time on real axis. The function can be scalar/matrix valued. The class also contains various operations on functions. t = -1 means the function on the imaginary(Matsubara) axis.
